# TrackSpendZ

> TrackSpendZ helps you see exactly where your money goes. Upload a bank or card statement — no bank login or account linking required — and instantly get spending breakdowns, hidden-subscription alerts, your real savings rate, and FIRE projections. Built for salaried professionals, dual-income households, and anyone who wants financial clarity without sharing their banking credentials.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://trackspendz.com/): Product overview, features list, and signup.
- [Features](https://trackspendz.com/features): Detailed summary of AI categorization, Monte Carlo simulations, and net worth tracking.
- [Pricing](https://trackspendz.com/pricing): Pricing tiers (Free, Pro, Enterprise) and subscription options.
- [Help Center](https://trackspendz.com/help): User guides, security protocols, and FAQs.
- [Contact Sales](https://trackspendz.com/contact): Demo requests and executive support.

## Tools

- [FIRE Calculator](https://trackspendz.com/tools/fire-calculator): Interactive Monte Carlo early retirement projection calculator.
- [Savings Rate Calculator](https://trackspendz.com/tools/savings-rate): Savings rate calculator to forecast retirement timelines.

## Resources

- [About Us](https://trackspendz.com/about): Mission, founders, and executive team.
- [Feedback](https://trackspendz.com/feedback): Submit bug reports and feature requests.
- [Privacy Policy](https://trackspendz.com/privacy): Data security, RLS, and privacy information.
- [Terms of Service](https://trackspendz.com/terms): Terms, usage policies, and subscription contracts.
